name: bindbc-assimp6
description: D bindings for the Open Asset Import Library (assimp) 6.0.5. bindbc-style — dynamic loading via dlopen/LoadLibrary by default; opt-in static binding behind version=BindAssimp_Static.

configurations.name: dynamic
configurations.comment: Default. Runtime dlopen/LoadLibrary of libassimp via bindbc-loader.

configurations.name: static
configurations.comment: Direct static link against a minimal libassimp (OBJ/glTF/FBX import+export only). Self-contained: preBuildCommands build the static archive per-platform via tools/build_assimp_min.sh (guarded — only builds if the .a/.lib is absent), and lflags pull it in by explicit path. Mirrors the D-Cycles / D-OpenSubdiv self-building pattern so a clean clone needs no manual prerequisite.
preBuildCommands-windows: cd /d "$PACKAGE_DIR" && cmd /c "if not exist lib\\assimp.lib bash tools/build_assimp_min.sh --static"
